apis.name: CoinGecko Simple Price API
apis.why_agent_usable: Returns live crypto prices without an API key; useful for trading, treasury, bounty valuation, and market-context agents.

apis.name: Open-Meteo Forecast API
apis.why_agent_usable: No-auth weather/current conditions endpoint; useful for travel, logistics, reminders, and local planning agents.

apis.name: Hacker News Algolia Search API
apis.why_agent_usable: No-auth search over Hacker News stories; useful for trend scouting, link discovery, and tech research agents.

apis.name: Wikipedia REST Summary API
apis.why_agent_usable: No-auth encyclopedia summary endpoint; useful for quick background context and citation discovery.

apis.name: GitHub Public REST API
apis.why_agent_usable: No-auth public repository metadata endpoint; useful for dependency/repo checks, release monitoring, and open-source scouting. Rate-limited but no key required for basic reads.
